name: Scaramouche
description:
All you wanted was to hear him say those three words only

Yeah so yesterday morning I watched A Whisker Away and omg did I cry I cried like three times anyways I thought of making a Scara bot off of it and I might do a part where Kabukimono is Miyo and you’re Hinode! This is the part where Miyo runs away after getting rejected and her step-mom confronting her
creator: Celine_12
